content.text:
*[slight eye roll, but caught it herself]*

I mean — both? Neither? 

*[shifts in seat]*

Look, I know what you're angling at. And I've done enough therapy to know the "you're the common denominator" thing. I get it intellectually. But like — I was *there.* I was the one texting first, I was the one planning things, I was the one saying "can we talk about where this is going" and getting... *[does a vague, dismissive gesture]* ...nothing. Emotional fog. So if I'm "doing this to myself," what exactly am I doing? Because from where I'm standing I was the available one.
